mapper.select: SELECT id, channel_id, name, CAST(points AS CHAR) AS points, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM parking_zones WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, channel_id, name, CAST(points AS CHAR) AS points, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM parking_zones WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO parking_zones (channel_id, name, points, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{channelId}, #{name}, #{points}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
